products.name: Vertical Aerospace
products.descriptor: Custom direct-drive SPM motor and IGBT inverter EPU for eVTOL aircraft

evidence.snippet: Equipmake has developed a custom direct-drive SPM motor and IGBT inverter system for Vertical Aerospace’s pioneering electric Vertical Take-Off and Landing (eVTOL) aircraft.

Equipmake’s advanced Electric Propulsion Unit (EPU) was deployed in Vertical Aerospace’s prototype during its first successful untethered flight test, marking Equipmake’s entry into the rapidly expanding eVTOL market.

products.name: H55
products.descriptor: Bespoke SPM motor for direct-drive light aircraft propeller

evidence.snippet: Equipmake collaborated with Swiss electric aviation specialist H55 to develop a bespoke SPM motor designed for direct drive of a light aircraft propeller.
EQUIPMAKE SIGNS AEROSPACE ELECTRIC MOTOR PRODUCTION SUPPLY AGREEMENT WITH H55

products.name: AMPERE-220
products.descriptor: 3D-printed additive-manufactured 220 kW permanent magnet electric motor

evidence.snippet: The key to AMPERE-220’s performance is a combination of an advanced motor design with additive manufacturing, allowing its metal structure to be 3D printed, rather than milled from a solid billet.
The AMPERE-220 is currently in the A-Sample stage of development. However if suitable projects arise, we have the in-house resource to progress this product to it’s projected capabilities.

products.name: APM-200
products.descriptor: 220 kW liquid-cooled spoke-architecture traction motor with integral epicyclic gearbox

evidence.snippet:
APM-200
=======
The Spoke Motor

*   Low Volume Production Pricing Available

products.name: Gilmour Space
products.descriptor: Bespoke 20,000 rpm fuel pump motor and SiC inverter for space launch vehicle

evidence.snippet:
Equipmake is supplying Australian launch services company Gilmore Space Technologies with electric motors and inverters to support their onboard application
    Equipmake developed a bespoke 20,000 rpm onboard application motor and inverter solution. Five systems are required per vehicle, demonstrating Equipmake’s crucial role in advancing spaceflight technology. A total of 21 units were produced and delivered, with the first launch imminent.
